headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Joining me today are Jim Umpleby, Chairman and CEO; Andrew Bonfield, Chief Financial Officer; Kyle Epley, Senior Vice President of Global Finance Services Division; Ryan Fiedler, Vice President of IR; and Robert Rengel, Senior Director of IR.  During our call, we’ll be discussing the fourth quarter earnings release we issued earlier today.
